Tribal Shaman scepter

Once in a while, when a friendly minion is summoned, the enemy fighter with the highest max health loses their weapon and armor for 3 sec. The target loses 50% of their armor attributes and cannot use armor abilities for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
